$comment: Recipe consumed by ~/.claude/skills/bump/SKILL.md. Vestige's project() block spans multiple lines, so version_pattern targets the indented VERSION line.
todos: Promote `## [Unreleased]` in CHANGELOG.md to `## [{NEW}] - {TODAY}` and write the body. Or, if [Unreleased] is empty, add a fresh `## [{NEW}] - {TODAY}` section above [Unreleased].
Run the audit: `python3 tools/audit/audit.py -t 1 2 3` and triage findings before committing.
Tag the commit: `git tag v{NEW}` (Vestige convention from prior releases).
